source: DGA Platforms Code — Foundations → Color system (https://design.dga.gov.sa/guidelines/foundations/color-system), official page rendered and read 2026-06-21. Version label on page: الإصدار 1.0. Earlier semantic 600 values were confirmed against the full official ramps on this read.
notes: Platforms Code organizes color into Neutral, Primary, and Semantic palettes, plus Secondary (Gold + Lavender) and a Gradient palette. Each color provides 12 steps: black, white, and ten shades (25,50,100,200,300,400,500,600,700,800,900,950).
The Primary palette is the Saudi green ('SA'). Gold and Lavender are Secondary palettes. The Gradient palette is built from the SA greens.
Within Gold the 600 step is labelled 'Primary 600'; within Lavender the 500 step is labelled 'Primary 500' on the official page.
VERIFY: the official page prints Info 50 as #ECFDF3 (identical to Success 50), which appears to be a source typo for a blue palette; confirm in the official Figma library before relying on Info 50.
Do not present these as official DGA compliance. Verified value extraction for implementation alignment only.

info._verify: Info 50 (#ECFDF3) duplicates Success 50 on the official page and looks like a typo for a blue palette.

success._note: Success is its OWN palette; do NOT substitute the SA primary green (#1B8354). Success 600 = #079455.

data_visualization._status: Implementation guidance (role-mapping of verified color tokens), NOT an official DGA 'chart token' set. The colors below are verified from the official DgaChart example; the role names (series-1..4, neutral) are this repository's mapping.
data_visualization._source: DGA Platforms Code — Components → Data display → Charts (https://design.dga.gov.sa/guidelines/components/data-display/charts). Exact colors taken from the official DgaChart (platformscode-react, ApexCharts-based) component example, confirmed 2026-06-21.
data_visualization.scheme: Charts use a monochromatic GREEN scheme (no gold/lavender for data series). A neutral gray (#E5E7EB) is used for a remaining/uncategorized series.
